items.name: Sarah Jenkins
items.text: The sourdough bread here is simply the best in town. Crusty on the outside, soft and perfectly sour on the inside. I come here every week!

items.name: Marcus T.
items.text: Ordered a birthday cake for my daughter and it was not only incredibly beautiful but tasted amazing. Highly recommend!

items.name: Emily R.
items.text: The butter croissants transport me straight back to Paris. Absolutely flaky, buttery perfection. The staff is always wonderfully warm too.
